summary: Tested Help/Tutorials pipeline end-to-end on /workspace with seeded session. All 7 tutorial PDFs (Getting-Started, Texture, Hardware, Sweep, Voice, Slicer, Gallery) return HTTP 200 with application/pdf. HelpMegaMenu lists all 7 anchors with correct /docs/<file>.pdf hrefs. HelpDialog 'Tutorials (PDF)' nav entry renders, tutorial-list shows all 7 picker buttons, clicking Voice/Slicer/Gallery picks correctly updates tutorial-iframe src, tutorial-open-new-tab (target=_blank) and tutorial-download (download attr) anchors update accordingly. Index 'Tutorial PDFs' card navigates to tutorials section. Esc closes dialog from tutorials tab. Existing quickstart and voice sections still render correctly. Zero functional issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: HelpDialog.jsx is ~770 lines — borderline of the 700-line guideline. Splitting the per-section render functions (Voice lexicon, AI, Shortcuts, Tutorials) into separate files would improve maintainability but is not blocking.
iframe src uses '/docs/<file>.pdf#toolbar=0&navpanes=0' which is a Chrome PDF viewer hint and is ignored by Firefox/Safari — acceptable progressive enhancement, no fix needed.
test_credentials: session_token cookie value=st_test_help_1780096781061 (already seeded, expires 7 days). Domain orca-cad-slice.preview.emergentagent.com.
seed_data_creation: None — reused existing pre-seeded session token.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDFs live at /app/frontend/public/docs/. Tutorials nav is the 2nd item in HelpDialog sidebar (after Index). The tutorial-iframe carries src like '/docs/<file>.pdf#toolbar=0&navpanes=0' — attribute-based assertions are sufficient (headless Chromium doesn't visually render PDFs). All 13 requested assertions verified PASS via Playwright on https://orca-cad-slice.preview.emergentagent.com/workspace with the seeded session_token cookie.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — pipeline is fully working.
